purpose: Close the paper by restating contribution, evidence, and future trajectory without redoing the abstract.

fixed_routines.name: Contribution-evidence-impact
fixed_routines.risk: Conclusion that merely repeats results feels weak.

fixed_routines.name: Takeaway compression
fixed_routines.risk: Too many claims dilute the final message.

fixed_routines.name: No-new-claims rule
fixed_routines.risk: New claims in conclusion can trigger reviewer skepticism.
